publishedAbstract: A configuration occurred where there is no active period. ~~~ 19m Warning ReconcileFailed cephobjectstore/ocs-storagecluster-cephobjectstore failed to reconcile CephObjectStore "openshift-storage/ocs-storagecluster-cephobjectstore". failed to create object store deployments: failed to configure multisite for object store: failed create ceph multisite for object-store ["ocs-storagecluster-cephobjectstore"]: failed to commit config changes after creating multisite config for CephObjectStore "openshift-storage/ocs-storagecluster-cephobjectstore": failed to get the current RGW configuration period to see if it needs changed%!(EXTRA []string=[]): command terminated with exit code 2 ~~~
publishedTitle: Ceph RADOS Gateway (RGW) Deployment Missing or in CLBO with error "ReconcileFailed: failed to get the current RGW configuration period" - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)
